image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Your brain loves evidence that agrees with you—and quietly ignores the rest.
Context visual: This is called confirmation bias, a cognitive trap we all fall into.
Escalation visual: Imagine you’re reading reviews for a new phone. You love brand X.
Evidence visual: You only focus on the glowing reviews and ignore any negative ones.
Payoff visual: This skews your perception, making you think the phone is flawless.
Cta visual: Next time, challenge your views. Seek opposing evidence!
